news.headline: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, T20 IPL batting prodigy, receives first India jersey
news.summary: Teenage star receives first India shirt from BCCI and is tipped to make his debut in a T20 match in Ireland on Friday.

news.headline: U.K. prime minister is out. The populist wave that toppled him is everywhere.
news.summary: Across the West’s advanced democracies, conventional political parties are being gutted by stagnant wages and fraying social contracts that have left voters fed up with the status quo.

news.headline: Former PM says Israel smuggled Starlink internet systems into Iran
news.summary: Former PM Naftali Bennett has admitted Israel smuggled Starlink internet systems into Iran.
